_doc: Edit this file to update the page. After editing, no rebuild is needed — content is read on each request. Image IDs come from the WP Media Library (upload, then look at the attachment URL or sidebar for the numeric ID).

hero.headline: Subscribe and save 20%
hero.subheadline: Lower your hardware costs and get auto-replenishment of receipts, ribbons, and supplies.

items.title: Real-time stock visibility
items.body: See live inventory from every outlet in one dashboard.

items.title: Auto-replenish supplies
items.body: Receipts and ribbons delivered before you run out.

items.title: Predictable monthly cost
items.body: One flat fee covers hardware, software, and consumables.

form.intro: Tell us about your business — we'll get back within one working day.
